description: The Ziegler EQ 96 ammeter is a robust, panel-mounted analog instrument designed for precise current measurement in electrical panels, switchgear, and industrial control systems. With its 96 × 96 mm face and class 1.5 accuracy, this meter delivers reliable performance in monitoring AC currents. Its rugged construction, clear dial, and durable IP-rated housing make it ideal for continuous use in demanding industrial environments.
